entities.description: Enhanced versions of groundnut developed for better yield or traits

entities.description: The regional area encompassing the study countries

entities.description: A statistical model used to analyze the adoption process

entities.description: An econometric approach used to estimate the impact of adoption on welfare

entities.name: GROSS MARGINS
entities.description: The difference between total revenue and variable costs of groundnut production

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total income earned by the households in the study

entities.name: PER CAPITA INCOME
entities.description: The average income per person within the households

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient and nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient financial resources, measured by reduction percentages

entities.name: FOOD CONSUMPTION SCORE
entities.description: A metric used to assess the level of food security
